mission.title: metallb: Re-implement helm chart
mission.description: Re-implement helm chart. Requested by 20+ users.

steps.title: Check current metallb deployment
steps.description:
Verify your metallb version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n metallb -l app.kubernetes.io/name=metallb
helm list -n metallb 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working metallb installation.

steps.title: Review metallb configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant metallb configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n metallb -l app.kubernetes.io/name=metallb
kubectl get configmap -n metallb -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=metallb
```
I have started a re-implementation of the metallb helm chart based on a combination of the previous chart in this repo, the [stable/metallb](https://github.com/helm/charts/tree/master/stable/metallb) chart in the soon-to-be-deprecated stable repo,

steps.title: Apply the fix for Re-implement helm chart
steps.description:
Create a new helm chart integrating features of the previous chart, as
well as stable/metallb and bitnami/metallb.

Features:
* Support new environment variables in speaker
* Use PodMonitor instead of ServiceMonitor (no need to create Services)
* Create PrometheusRule to detect stale config and config-not-loaded
* Configurable PrometheusRule alerts for address pool exhaustion
* Support MetalLB controller creating memberlist secret
* Standardize labels using template helper
* Create

See the fix PR for details: linked PR

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n metallb -l app.kubernetes.io/name=metallb
kubectl get events -n metallb --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Re-implement helm chart" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
Create a new helm chart integrating features of the previous chart, as
well as stable/metallb and bitnami/metallb.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with metallb installed or the issue environment reproducible.
